a: Yes, really ₹0. We don't charge a franchise fee, deposit, or royalty. Our revenue comes from the tea premix and supplies we provide you — that's our business model, not a hidden catch.

q: What if I have no experience in the tea business?
a: That's fine. We provide 7-10 days of complete training — from making chai to counter management. Most of our current franchise partners were new to the business when they started.

q: Where does the milk and other supplies come from?
a: Milk is sourced fresh daily from trusted local suppliers (no powder). The masala premix comes from our central unit, so the taste stays consistent across every outlet.

q: How long does it take to recover the investment?
a: It depends on the location, footfall, and daily cup sales — it can range from a few months to about a year. We don't quote a single fixed number because it varies by location; use the Tapri Slate calculator to see a monthly profit range based on your estimated cup sales.
The agreement is lifetime, but it isn't one-sidedly binding — the terms and conditions are clearly stated in the written agreement; read everything before signing.
Our team trains you either on-site or at our central unit — covering chai-making, hygiene standards, stock management, and customer handling.

q: Do you help find a location?
a: Finding the location (150-200 sq ft) is mainly your responsibility, but we personally inspect every proposed site to check if it's suitable for the business — and we'll tell you clearly if it isn't.
An FSSAI license and Shop Act registration are required. Our team guides you through obtaining both.
